/usr/bin/c++  -Wno-deprecated-declarations -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/harness_default.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/harness_default.dir/harness_default/main_default.cc.o CMakeFiles/harness_default.dir/common/logger.cpp.o -o /work/build/bin/harness_default  -lnvinfer -lnvinfer_plugin -lgflags -lglog /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart_static.a -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a lwis/liblwis.a /work/build/inference/loadgen/build/libmlperf_loadgen.a -lnuma -lnvinfer -lnvinfer_plugin -lglog /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart_static.a -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -lnuma
